title: carex coulteri
intro: Carex coulteri, also known as Coulter's sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Carex coulteri include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in infusions and decoctions for its medicinal properties.
